61652.title: Antonio Filippo wins today's Omloop Het Volk
61652.extract:
Saturday, March 3, 2007
 
Today, Filippo Pozzato (Team Liquigas) won the 62nd running of the Belgian distance bike race Omloop Het Volk with a sneak attack past the leaders, Stuart O'Grady (Team CSC) and Juan Antonio Flecha (Team Rabobank). O'Grady faded badly at the end, but Flecha hung on for second. Tom Boonen (Team Quickstep) from the chase group came third.


Sources

Mona Albano. Omloop Het Volk cycling road race 2007 — Cycling TV, 2007-03-02
